name: Low Fat Sugar Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Promise Ultra Fat Free Milk
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Prepare baking sheets with cooking spray. In a mixing bowl, combine margarine, spread, sugar, egg white, and vanilla extract. In another mixing bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt. Add wet ingredients to dry ingredients just until moistened. Cover and chill overnight.
On a heavily floured surface (the dough will be sticky, so use more flour), roll the dough to 1/8-inch thickness. Using a 2-1/2 inch cutter, cut the dough into desired shapes. Arrange cookies 1-inch apart on prepared baking sheets. Bake for 15 minutes or until lightly browned. If desired, decorate cookies with powdered sugar icing.
